form.formComment: Two back was well beaten into second after a quick start, behind Laneys Last at Marburg over 1850m in a 3yo+ No NR on April 5 at $2.25. Then a handy effort when beaten by 6 m finishing third after a quick start, behind Cool Dude Joey at Albion Park over 1660m in a 4yo+ NR up to 45 on April 10 at $21. Very hard to beat.
